message:
shared: Update Codex parser for v0.89.0 format

- Add support for exec_command tool (new name for shell)
- Handle new cmd string format instead of command array
- Parse new text-based output format with exit codes
- Filter AGENTS.md instructions and permissions prefixes
- Update crud.jsonl fixture with fresh v0.89.0 session
- Update test snapshot for new format

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ykanedpcadq4nb2l2n3xhb47

files.patch:
@@ -6,191 +6,175 @@ import { formatCwdWithTilde } from "./paths";
 import type { LiteLLMModelPricing } from "./pricing";

-const TEST_NOW = new Date("2025-10-17T23:00:00Z");

     input_cost_per_token: 0.00000125,

-    expect(serialized.transcript.cwd).toBe(formatCwdWithTilde("/Users/philipp/dev/vibeinsights/fixtures"));
